title: Sector 151
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Sector |image= |name=Sector 151 |region=*[[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Phracas system/Legends|Phracas system]] *[[The Negs]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' places locations in this sector in the part of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] that is part of [[the Negs]] region. |coordinates=J-10 |subsectors= |quadrants= |systems=[[Phracas system/Legends|Phracas system]]{{CSWECite|III|24|Phracas}} |otherplanets= |moons= |stations= |asteroids= |comets= |nebulae= |routes= |other= |species= |capital= |affiliation= |battles1= |b1= |battles2= |b2= |battles3= |b3= |battles4= |b4= |battles5= |b5= |battles6= |b6= |battles7= |b7= |battles8= |b8= |battles9= |b9= }} {{Quote|I believe I have our heading prior to the jump to within half a degree. I apologize for the imprecision.''"
"''That would put us on a course toward Sector One-Five-One.''"
"''Yes. The boundary is eight light-years from our original position.''"
"''Is there anyone out in 'Fifty-One who might be able to help us?''"
"''I'm sorry. Artoo has navigational data only. There is no geopolitical or sociological data.|[[Lobot/Legends|Lobot]] and [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]]|''[[Shield of Lies]]''}} '''Sector 151''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Sector/Legends|sector]] the politics and societies of which the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] knew nothing. [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] noted that the [[Teljkon Vagabond]] was heading in its general direction if it did not change course. ==Appearances== *''[[Shield of Lies]]'' {{1stm}} ==Sources== *''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Third Edition, Revised and Expanded]]'' *{{CSWECite|III||Phracas}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Sector 151 }} [[Category:Sectors of the Core Worlds]] [[Category:Sectors of the Negs]]
